title: tragacantha anthylloides
intro: Tragacantha anthylloides, also known as Kidney Vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include being a diuretic and anti-inflammatory, and is often used to treat kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and inflammation. The health benefits of Tragacantha anthylloides include its ability to help reduce blood pressure, alleviate symptoms of menopause, and promote overall urinary health. Herbal preparations of Tragacantha anthylloides can be found in teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used in traditional medicine to support kidney function and alleviate associated symptoms.
